data.title: James Wynn is currently facing a floating loss of $3.5 million, and the previous liquidation price was only $162
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, James Wynn was almost liquidated at $106,338. Just 45 minutes ago, the BTC price fell to $106,500 on HyperLiquid. James was only $162 away from being liquidated, and he currently faces a floating loss of $3.5 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Outperforms Gold in ETF Inflows Amid Market Uncertainty
data.description:
TL;DR Over the past five weeks, U. S. -based Bitcoin ETFs have attracted over $9 billion, while gold-backed funds lost $2. 8 billion in the same period. Bitcoin recently hit an all-time high of $111,980 and is now trading at $107,155. 42, with a market cap of $2. 12 trillion. Analysts see Bitcoin gaining ground as a hedge against global. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/bitcoin-outperforms-gold-in-etf-inflows-amid-market-uncertainty/

data.title: Syscoin Hashrate Spikes Following Announcement of Trustless Bitcoin Bridge
data.description:
Bitcoin is no longer locked out of Web3. Miners are responding. Syscoin has unveiled a game-changing breakthrough in blockchain interoperability: a fully trustless Bitcoin bridge designed for the modular era. Built from first principles, it removes the need for centralized custody, trusted relayers, or risky multisig systems. Instead, it enables verifiable BTC movement across chains […]
source: https://droomdroom.com/syscoin-hashrate-spikes-following-announcement-of-trustless-bitcoin-bridge/

data.title: Today, the US Bitcoin ETF has a net inflow of 4007 BTC, and the Ethereum ETF has a net inflow of 30183 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Lookonchian monitoring, today 10 US Bitcoin ETFs had a net inflow of 4,007 BTC, of ​​which BlackRock had an inflow of 4,476 BTC. BlackRock currently holds 663,773 BTC, worth US$71.27 billion; 9 Ethereum ETFs had a net inflow of 30,183 ETH, of which BlackRock had an inflow of 19,977 ETH. BlackRock currently holds 1,370,710 ETH, worth US$3.64 billion.

data.title: Potential Rate Cuts Discussed Amid Tariff Negotiations
data.description: According to Odaily, Federal Reserve official Goolsbee has indicated that if tariffs are resolved through agreements or other means, the situation may return to a point where interest rate cuts are possible.

data.title: Spain's Santander Bank is developing a preliminary stablecoin plan to enter the crypto market
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Banco Santander SA is considering expanding its digital asset business, including a preliminary plan to launch a stablecoin and provide cryptocurrency services to retail customers of its digital bank. People familiar with the matter said that the stablecoin plan is still in its early stages. A person familiar with the matter revealed that Openbank, an online banking subsidiary of Santander Bank, has applied for relevant licenses under the latest EU regulatory framework to provide crypto services to retail customers. (Bloomberg)

data.title: Fed's Goolsbee: If tariffs are avoided through agreement or other means, rate cuts may be resumed
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Fed's Goolsbee said that if tariffs are avoided through an agreement or other means, it may return to a situation where interest rates can be cut. (Jinshi)

data.title: XRP Price Bullish: VivoPower Launches $121M XRP Treasury – Will Ripple Surge?
data.description:
The publicly listed energy company VivoPower is investing $121 million in XRP as a strategic reserve, making it the first company in the world with an XRP-focused treasury.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/xrp-price-bullish-vivopower-launches-121m-xrp-treasury-will-ripple-surge/

data.title: Santander Bank Explores Expansion in Digital Assets Amid European Banking Trends
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Banco Santander SA is considering expanding its digital asset operations as European banks increasingly focus on this sector. The Spanish bank is exploring initial plans to launch a stablecoin and provide cryptocurrency services to retail customers through its digital banking platform.

Sources familiar with the matter indicate that the stablecoin initiative is still in its early stages. Due to the private nature of these discussions, the sources requested anonymity. One source revealed that Santander's online banking subsidiary, Openbank, has applied for the necessary licenses under the latest EU regulatory framework to offer crypto services to retail clients.

data.title: Twenty One Capital Raises Additional $100 Million Through Convertible Bond Offering
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin company Twenty One Capital has raised an additional $100 million through convertible senior secured notes, bringing its total financing to $685 million. According to documents filed with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), the new financing came from existing investors and sponsors who exercised their option to purchase more notes, an option originally granted in an April financing round.
Twenty One Capital was launched by Cantor's Brandon Lutnick through a SPAC structure, its well-known owners include iFinex and Tether, and is led by Strike CEO Jack Mallers. (CoinDesk)

data.title: Opinion: Hyperliquid's vault may be at risk if James Wynn is liquidated
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, the person most worried about James Wynn's impending liquidation may not be himself, but Hyperliquid Vault (HLP), with nearly 500 million positions being dispatched.

data.title: Arkham: 97% of Strategy Bitcoin holdings have been identified on-chain
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Arkham posted on the X platform that it has tracked and identified 53,800 additional BTC (about 5.75 billion US dollars) of Strategy, and the total tracking volume has reached 59.92 billion US dollars of BTC, accounting for 97% of its total holdings. The data is based on the newly identified Strategy address of 70,800 BTC yesterday. Arkham said that about 107,000 BTC are held in Fidelity and cannot be identified on the chain, and the remaining 454,000 are in independent custody addresses visible on the chain. The goal is to achieve real-time public reserve proof of Strategy BTC assets.

data.title: Kazakhstan to Launch CryptoCity Pilot Project for Cryptocurrency Payments
data.description: According to Odaily, Kazakhstan's President Kassym-Jomart Tokayev announced the launch of a pilot project named 'CryptoCity' at the 2025 Astana International Forum. This initiative will allow the use of cryptocurrencies for payments of goods and services within a designated area. The project aims to create a regulated digital asset sandbox environment to promote the practical application of cryptocurrencies. CryptoCity is expected to be established near the southeastern border of Kazakhstan in a settlement called Alatau.
